positive.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for seasons_pos
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u20,axiom,
    wants_long_vacation(james)).

cnf(u13,axiom,
    summer != fall).

cnf(u23,axiom,
    ~wants_long_vacation(mia)).

cnf(u12,axiom,
    summer != winter).

cnf(u22,axiom,
    ~favorite_season(mia,summer)).

cnf(u15,axiom,
    spring != fall).

cnf(u17,axiom,
    favorite_season(X0,summer) | ~wants_long_vacation(X0)).

cnf(u14,axiom,
    spring != winter).

cnf(u16,axiom,
    spring != summer).

cnf(u18,axiom,
    favorite_season(emma,summer)).

cnf(u11,axiom,
    fall != winter).

cnf(u21,negated_conjecture,
    ~favorite_season(mia,spring)).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable
